title: Roleplay-script note — 'I have been hired by a client'
html:
TL;DR

  • One of the earliest extant Apple Notes (Yahir age ~15, July 2018), preserved under the auto-generated title 542638062. Content is a short two-actor menace script — "I have been hired by a client to take care of business, you well tell me your exact location, or I will pay [REDACTED-ADDR]" — addressed to a "David", with a 10-9-8 countdown.
  • Reads as creative writing / roleplay / movie-line riffing rather than a real threat — no follow-through anywhere in the corpus, and the dramatic register matches the kind of Liam-Neeson-Taken-mimicry common to that age. Filed alongside other early 2018 Grants Pass note-app experiments.
  • "David" is the recurring teen-era confidant who later shows up in 2024 01 04 thoughts on 1323 dad in bad state and the 2021 letter to Dave — same person across the years; this 2018 entry is the earliest mention by a wide margin.
  • The note's existence is the data point: at 15, Yahir was already using the Notes app as a scratch-stage for voices that aren't his own — a writing instinct that would later show up in the note as letter to self form (which IS his voice, addressed to himself).
  • Title is a meaningless integer because Apple Notes auto-stamps the unix-ish ID when no first line is added — useful corpus fingerprint for "draft never given a title" notes.

Key quote (verbatim, address redacted)

"I have been hired by a client to take care of business, you well tell me your exact location, or I will pay [REDACTED-ADDR] / I am not playing around David, you have 1 seconds to decide / 10 9 8"

Why it matters in the graph

  • Earliest 2018 specimen of the creative-roleplay sub-genre — distinct from the letter to self manifestos of the same era. Pair against 2018 12 24 normal neutral to everything (efficiency self-portrait) and 2018 08 23 make water flowing one direction analogy for life (life-metaphor seed) to see the range of teen note-app modes at once.
  • "David" sits in the same orbit as Brenda and Travis — the named teen-era humans who recur from Grants Pass forward. This is the moment David enters the corpus.

Open questions

  • Was this a school assignment fragment, a movie-line transcription, or pure invention?
  • Does the dramatic-voice instinct surface anywhere else in the 2018-2019 stretch (Hamilton paper monologues, FBLA pitch drafts)?

Privacy redaction

  • A residential street address that appeared verbatim in the raw note has been redacted from the quote above. Raw file untouched per CLAUDE.md sacredness rule.

Wikilinks

david · grants pass or · 2018 12 24 normal neutral to everything · yahir family
